name: Joshua Herrington

hero.sub: Court of the Table advisor · compulsive builder · always drafting the next chapter.
hero.caption: Kyrgyzstan — the three of us

mission.heading: A check. Not a maybe.
mission.body1: My work is protecting Americans — the middle class, the mass affluent, the next-door millionaire — with guarantees and risk-based planning. On the worst day of someone's life, the diagnosis or the breadwinner who doesn't come home, I want to show up with a check. Not a market-dependent figure. A check.
mission.body2: A man of two worlds: I served the world — Japan, Europe, Canada — and came home to protect the people who build this country. The American taxpayer, the mass-affluent resident, the expat and the immigrant whose money is American-taxed. If it protects a family, that's my front.

credentials: MDRT Academy 2022 → first MDRT qualification 2025 → Court of the Table 2026
